title: Upthrust Esports India Rising/2022

|discord=syhNkeA9Sp |youtube=c/UPTHRUSTESPORTS |instagram=upthrust_esports |instagram2=ue.indiarising2022 |loco=upthrustesports |previous= |next=Upthrust Esports India Rising/2024{{!}}2024 }} ==About== Upthrust Esports presents '''Wingslifestyle-UE India Rising (Series-2022)''' in collaboration with [https://www.tickertape.in/ TickerTape], Battlegrounds Mobile India's tournament with the massive prize pool of 15,00,000{{Abbr/INR}} ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Production talent |b1=DSTRXN|b1flag=in|b1name=Nitish Singh Basera |b2=TR1GN0|b2flag=in|b2name=Harsh Saxena }} {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator Hindi|lang= |b1=Spero|b1flag=in|b1name= |b2=Gamezotech|b2flag=in|b2name= |b3=RA1|b3flag=in|b3name= }} {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator English|lang= |b1=NekRoz|b1flag=in|b1name= |b2=Inferno|b2flag=in|b2name= |b3=Raider|b3flag=in|b3name= }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== * '''''Round 1:''' ** Open for all ** Total teams 4000 from online registration. ** Divided into 200 groups. ** Each group consist of 20 teams. ** 1 Match per group will be played. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 3 teams}} advance to '''''Round 2''''' * '''''Round 2:''' ** Total teams 600 from '''Round 1'''. ** Divided into 30 groups. ** Each group consist of 20 teams. ** 1 Match per group will be played. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 4 teams}} advance to '''''Group stage''''' * '''''Group Stage:''' ** Total teams 120 from '''Round 3'''. ** Divided into 6 groups. ** Each group consist of 20 teams. ** 3 Match per group will be played. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 2 teams}} advance to '''''Quarter Finals''''' * '''''Quarter Finals:''' ** Total teams 27. ** 15 '''Invited teams''' + 12 Qualified teams from '''Group stage'''. ** Divided into 3 groups. ** Each group consist of 9 teams. ** Matches will be played on round robin Format. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 7 teams}} advance to '''''Semi Finals''''' * '''''Semi Finals:''' ** Total teams 24 ** 15 '''Invited teams'''+ 9 Qualified teams from '''Quarter Finals'''. ** Divided into 3 groups. ** Each group consist of 9 teams. ** 12 Matches per group will be played. ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 18 teams}} advance to '''''Grand Finals''''' ====Points Distribution==== {{{title|For {{abbr|"Points Matrix"|Points Matrix}} '''Click here'''.}}}
